bases.xlink:href: #xpointer(//molecule[@id='M1F190F1']//basisGroup[@id='1' or @id='2' or @id='3' or @id='4' or @id='5' or @id='6' or @id='7' or @id='8' or @id='9' or @id='10' or @id='11' or @id='12' or @id='13' or @id='14' or @id='15' or @id='16' or @id='17' or @id='18'])
#xpointer(//molecule[@id='M1F190F1']//basisGroup[@id='19' or @id='20' or @id='21' or @id='22' or @id='23' or @id='24' or @id='25' or @id='26'])

#xpointer(//molecule[@id='M18F0FFB']//basisGroup[@id='1' or @id='2' or @id='3' or @id='4' or @id='5' or @id='6' or @id='7' or @id='8' or @id='9' or @id='10' or @id='11' or @id='12' or @id='13' or @id='14' or @id='15' or @id='16' or @id='17' or @id='18'])
#xpointer(//molecule[@id='M18F0FFB']//basisGroup[@id='19' or @id='20' or @id='21' or @id='22' or @id='23' or @id='24' or @id='25' or @id='26'])

input.p: pop !Mulliken population analysis using scf density
individual} !give occupations of individual basis functions
dm,2350.2} !save MRCI density matrix on record 2350, file 2
individual} !give occupations of individual basis functions
density,2350.2; !use property program to compute expectation values
